announcements.title: We're working on these improvements
announcements.body:
We're actively addressing feedback and tightening up the experience. Here's what's in progress right now:

1. UI glitches
2. Tutorial and practice match issues
3. UI errors
4. AI word choice
5. Categories not all displaying

— Team · 11:44 PM EST, May 5, 2026

announcements.title: Word Chain Royale announcements
announcements.body: This feed is the official place for patch notes, limited-time events, and scheduled maintenance. Open the Home tab in the app to see the latest post — we'll notify you locally when a new announcement is published.
